entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Please fully enhance and make sure the stubs/placeholders are correctly enhanced to full production ready code that isnt simulated aka real backend'

Chat Edit: 'Yes please do this and fully allow it to edit/create/delete/make/change files/sources and also can you allow it to do !search where it can search the internet for planning or answering questions'
